instructions: Write tests/visual/perf-responsive.spec.ts: for each viewport, visit /, scroll to each of 6 section ids, wait 600ms, take a full-page screenshot to artifacts/screenshots/iter${args.iteration}/${viewport}-${id}.png.
Read screenshots: report any with horizontal overflow, clipped HUD, missing canvas/svg, or obvious mis-layout. Score each viewport 0-100.
Return JSON { perViewport: { "375x812": {score, issues:[]}, ... }, overallScore, totalIssues:N, screenshots:[paths] }
prompt.task: Take full-page screenshots at every viewport for every section, then assess visual quality.
